formulae.interpretation: only modular-addition carry is intervened on; all other transition inputs/components are fixed
formulae.speck_do_carry_zero: x_cf=(ROR(x) XOR y) XOR k; y_cf=ROL(y) XOR x_cf
formulae.speck_factual: x'=(ROR(x)+y) XOR k; y'=ROL(y) XOR x'
formulae.speck_identity: factual_next XOR counterfactual_next = (sum XOR xor) repeated in both words

scope_note: Known-state/known-key mechanism intervention. A low ablation p-value attributes this F8 statistic to modular-addition carry under the tested transition model; it is not key recovery or a PQC break.
